title: Part 3 – Conversation : l'enregistrement à l'hôtel
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Good afternoon, welcome to the Lakeview Hotel. Do you have a reservation? Man: Yes, I booked a single room for two nights under the name Carter. Woman: Let me check... I'm sorry, but I can only find a reservation for one night. Would you like to extend your stay? Man: That's strange, I'm sure I booked two nights online. Could you check again? Otherwise, yes, please add one more night. Woman: I've added an extra night to your reservation. Your room is on the fifth floor, and breakfast is served from seven to ten in the morning. Man: Great, thank you. Is the gym open all day? Woman: Yes, it's open twenty-four hours, right next to the pool on the second floor.

questions.prompt: What problem does the man have?
choices: His reservation only covers one night.
questions.explanation: La réceptionniste indique qu'elle ne trouve une réservation que pour une nuit, alors que l'homme pensait en avoir réservé deux.

questions.prompt: Where is the man's room located?
questions.explanation: La réceptionniste précise : "Your room is on the fifth floor".

questions.prompt: What does the woman say about the gym?
choices: It is only open in the morning.
questions.explanation: Elle répond : "Yes, it's open twenty-four hours, right next to the pool on the second floor".
